tasks.task: Learn about semantic HTML elements and their benefits
tasks.description: Understand how semantic HTML can improve accessibility, SEO rankings, and maintainability of web pages.

tasks.task: Review the use of main, section, article, aside, header, footer, and nav elements in HTML
tasks.description: Analyze examples provided in the transcript to identify how these semantic elements are used for structuring content effectively.

tasks.task: Apply knowledge by creating a simple blog post with appropriate use of semantic elements
tasks.description: Practice using HTML5 tags like header, main, article, nav and aside to structure different parts of a page logically.

tasks.task: Implement assistive technology considerations in HTML coding
tasks.description: Explore how semantic elements aid screen readers and other assistive technologies in understanding the structure and context of content.
